response: The DevOps team alerts relevant personnel that the SSL certificate for api.company.com is scheduled to expire in 7 days on May 4, with auto-renewal failing because the required _acme-challenge.api.company.com CNAME record was removed during a recent DNS migration. The DevOps team has determined re-adding the missing CNAME record will resolve the issue, states they will complete this action today, and flags the update for team visibility.
